localization.en: Later during setup, you will connect this printer to a Wireless or Ethernet network. To prepare for connecting, review and complete our tips.

Disconnect this computer from any VPN connections.
Connect the printer to the same network as this computer.

Turn on Bluetooth and Wi-Fi on this computer.
Disconnect this computer from any VPN connections.
Connect the printer to the same network as this computer.
Complete printer setup in a space with a strong network connection.
The printer is powered on and in Wi-Fi setup mode. Check for setup mode
Make sure you have access to the Wi-Fi password, if needed.
Stay nearby the printer during setup.

Disconnect this computer from any VPN connections.
Connect the printer to the same network as this computer.

The printer is powered on.
Make sure you have access to the Wi-Fi password, if needed.
